title: Market DNA Passport
subtitle: 17-Metric Instrument Fingerprint — Retracement Frequencies, Smoothness Index, Cosine Mutation Detection
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: HIGH EXTRACT — 17-metric DNA profile is a comprehensive instrument calibration tool. Retracement frequency distribution (38%/50%/62%/>70%) tells us where HL retracements typically land for each instrument. Smoothness index indicates trending vs ranging. Cosine distance for regime mutation detection. Directly upgrades our symbol-specific config.

candlestick_structure.wick_body_ratio_avg: mean(total_shadows / body) — high = reversal candles; low = trend candles
candlestick_structure.pct_close_near_high: fraction of bars closing in top 20% of range — bullish bias
candlestick_structure.pct_close_near_low: fraction of bars closing in bottom 20% of range — bearish bias
candlestick_structure.pct_doji: fraction with body < 10% of range — indecision frequency

volatility.pct_spikes: fraction of bars with TR > spike_mult * ATR (default spike_mult=2.0)
volatility.vol_clustering: fraction of large bars followed by large bars — volatility persistence

structure.swing_cycle_bars_avg: mean bars between fractal extremes — swing pace
structure.fractal_density: fraction of bars that are fractal extremes — choppy(high) vs trendy(low)
structure.breakout_follow_through: fraction of fractal breakouts reaching ATR×0.5 within 50 bars

retracement_frequencies.retr_38_freq: fraction of swings retracing 33-45% (shallow — strong trend)
retracement_frequencies.retr_62_freq: fraction of swings retracing 55-68% (deep — moderate trend)

retracement_detection.algorithm: For each swing impulse: scan next 50 bars, find max retracement = (retrace_dist / impulse_size); bucket into 38/50/62/>70% bands
retracement_detection.use_for_creviaderiv: If instrument's retr_50_freq > 0.4 (40% of swings retrace to 50%), set default HL zone depth to 50% Fibonacci. If retr_38_freq dominant, shallower zones.

cosine_mutation_detection.formula: distance = 1 - dot(A, B) / (norm(A) * norm(B)); flag if distance > 0.12
cosine_mutation_detection.use: Compare current 300-bar DNA vs prior 300-bar DNA. If cosine distance > 0.12 = regime shift. Adjust config or pause trading.

keep: All 17 metrics as per-symbol calibration data — run once per symbol, cache results
Retracement frequency distribution — tells us where HL typically lands per instrument
smoothness_index — trending instruments need different zone settings than choppy
Cosine distance for regime mutation detection
breakout_follow_through — measures how often price follows through after zone break
discard: Session range shares (less relevant for synthetics)
improve: Run MarketDNA once per symbol at startup, store in symbol_config
Use retracement frequencies to calibrate zone depth per symbol
Use smoothness_index to switch between impulsive-only (smooth) and corrective-allowed (choppy) mode
Use mutation detection to trigger config review when regime shifts

per_symbol_config_additions.smoothness_index: If > 0.7: prefer impulsive zones. If < 0.4: consider ranging config.
per_symbol_config_additions.dominant_retracement: Set HL zone depth to match most common retracement (38/50/62%)
per_symbol_config_additions.fractal_density: High density (> 0.15): use tighter fractal lookback. Low density: wider lookback.
per_symbol_config_additions.pct_spikes: High spike frequency (> 0.05): use velocity percentile (Part 29) not fixed threshold
